env HOME=$WORK/home
mkdir $WORK/home
sin-code memory --db $WORK/mem.db add 'gopher eats bananas'
sin-code memory --db $WORK/mem.db add 'gopher likes apples'
sin-code memory --db $WORK/mem.db list
stdout 'gopher'
stdout 'bananas'
stdout 'apples'
sin-code memory --db $WORK/mem.db stats
stdout 'Total:'
